changelog: Performance: removed the focus magnify (cards growing 1.05–1.10x on focus) and colored glow shadows app-wide. Even though graphicsLayer is hardware-accelerated, every animating card triggered a layer composition pass and a redraw of the surrounding rail every focus change — on Fire Sticks and lower-end Google TV that stacked across visible cards and tanked scroll framerate.
Reduced the central tvFocusable Modifier (used by every screen) to: 2dp cyan border on focus + cyan tint background fill. No GPU layer, no animation timeline, no scale clipping the screen edge.
Fixed magnify-clip bug: the leftmost card in every rail no longer bleeds past x=0 on focus.
Stripped 26 scale animations + 17 graphicsLayer scaleX/Y blocks + 5 colored shadow glow blocks across home rows, browse, collections, decade years, themed catalog/detail.
